channel.title: Risk Management on CurrentFlow | Solar Business Software for Australian Installers
channel.description: Recent content in Risk Management on CurrentFlow | Solar Business Software for Australian Installers

item.title: Why I Stopped Relying on a Single Solar Supplier (And What It Cost Me First)
item.description: For a long stretch in my own solar business, I had one supplier and I thought that made me smart. The pricing was good. The rep knew me by name and knew how I worked. Orders went through without friction, credit terms were sorted, and when something went sideways I had one number to call. It felt like a strength. It was actually the single biggest operational risk in the business, and I could not see it because nothing had gone wrong yet.
